name: Heritage Route
palette: aged parchment cream, ink navy, faded sepia, deep oxblood accent
line_style: fine etched line-art, vintage cartographic stippling, restrained shading
texture_notes: aged map paper background, distressed edges, dhow ships and trade-route motifs in background

name: Mother's Kitchen
palette: kraft brown base, warm terracotta, sage green, paprika red, mustard ochre
line_style: hand-drawn organic line-art, soft watercolor fills, slightly imperfect strokes
texture_notes: raw kraft cardboard texture, illustrated culinary objects (mortar, pot, spices) scattered as a pattern

name: Bold Nomad
palette: matte black, vibrant signal orange, single-color icon
line_style: flat geometric icon, single-weight line, repeating tessellated pattern
texture_notes: high-contrast modern packaging, repeating motif as wallpaper pattern across the front panel
